Lady Stonetree
Ladies Stonetree (left), Sunderly, and Piper, rock wives of Quellon Greyjoy by coldraindropsss

Lady Stonetree was a noblewoman of House Stonetree.[2] She was the first rock wife of Lord Quellon Greyjoy.[1] Her given name is unknown.

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 3 Family
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Lady Stonetree was wed by a priest of the Drowned God to Lord Quellon Greyjoy.[2]

She was the mother of Harlon, Quenton and Donel Greyjoy. After her death, Lord Quellon took a new rock wife, Lady Sunderly[1]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Aeron recalls Lady Stonetree after the death of Balon Greyjoy, King of the Isles and the North.[1]
